title: Payment gateway timeout
description: Customer reported 404 error during checkout on mobile devices.

title: Login issues with MFA
description: Users not receiving the 6-digit verification code via SMS.

title: Invoice layout bug
description: The company logo is overlapping with the address line on PDF exports.

title: Feature request: Dark mode
description: Requesting a dark mode toggle for the main administration panel.

title: API rate limit reached
description: Internal logs show multiple 429 errors for the external shipping API.

title: Incorrect currency conversion
description: The BDT to USD conversion rate is outdated on the pricing page.

title: Broken link in footer
description: The 'Privacy Policy' link leads to a broken 404 page.

title: Slow dashboard loading
description: Analytics dashboard takes over 10 seconds to load data for larger accounts.

title: Password reset email failed
description: User requested reset 3 times but never received the email link.

title: Database connection error
description: Occasional 500 Internal Server Error during peak traffic hours.

title: Typo in welcome email
description: The word 'Success' is misspelled as 'Sucess' in the onboarding email.

title: Bulk upload failure
description: CSV upload fails when the file size exceeds 5MB without a warning message.
